jobs.title: NICL Assistant Vacancy 2026, Apply Online For 500 Posts
selection_process: Phase I: Preliminary Written Exam (Objective – 100 Marks)
Phase II: Mains Written Exam (Objective – 200 Marks)
jobs.how_to_apply: Visit the official website https://nationalinsurance.nic.co.in/ Find and click the “Recruitment Link” or “Apply Online” link on the homepage. First, register – enter your name, email, mobile number, and password. After registering, log in and focus on the application form—specifically, the personal details, qualifications, and selection of the position. Upload required documents: Photograph (JPG, max 50KB), Signature (JPG, max 20KB), Educational Certificates, ID Proof, Caste Certificate (if applicable). Pay the application fee [Online – UPI / Debit Card / Credit Card / Net Banking]. Preview all details before submitting. Correct any errors. After final submission, note down the confirmation page/application number and be sure to take a printout.

jobs.title: NHM Ambala Recruitment 2026, Notification Out, Apply Now
jobs.how_to_apply: Download the form: Visit the official website or download it from the link below. Fill Form: Fill out the form carefully in block letters and provide correct personal, educational, and professional details. Attach all documents: Include self-attested copies of educational certificates, experience letters, fee receipts, and proof of age (Aadhaar, PAN, etc.). Interview: If the recruitment is based on an interview, bring all original documents with you to the interview. Envelope: Also, attach a self-addressed envelope measuring 25 cm x 10 cm. If required in the notification. The envelope containing the application should be superscribed “Application for the post of __________________________.” Submit the application to the Office of Civil Surgeon, Ambala, before the last date.

jobs.title: HPSC District Manager Recruitment 2026, Check Eligibility, Selection Process & How to Apply
jobs.how_to_apply: Visit the official website https://hpsc.gov.in/ Find and click the “Recruitment Link” or “Apply Online” link on the homepage. First, register – enter your name, email, mobile number, and password. After registering, log in and focus on the application form—specifically, the personal details, qualifications, and selection of the position. Upload required documents: Photograph (JPG, max 50KB), Signature (JPG, max 20KB), Educational Certificates, ID Proof, Caste Certificate (if applicable). Pay the application fee [Online – UPI / Debit Card / Credit Card / Net Banking]. Preview all details before submitting. Correct any errors. After final submission, note down the confirmation page/application number and be sure to take a printout.

jobs.title: Arya Kanya Mahavidyalaya Shahabad Recruitment 2026, Apply Online
jobs.how_to_apply: Visit the official website https://www.akmvshahabad.edu.in/ Find and click the “Recruitment Link” or “Apply Online” link on the homepage. First, register – enter your name, email, mobile number, and password. After registering, log in and focus on the application form—specifically, the personal details, qualifications, and selection of the position. Upload required documents: Photograph (JPG, max 50KB), Signature (JPG, max 20KB), Educational Certificates, ID Proof, Caste Certificate (if applicable). Pay the application fee [Online – UPI / Debit Card / Credit Card / Net Banking]. Preview all details before submitting. Correct any errors. After final submission, note down the confirmation page/application number and be sure to take a printout. Submit the hard copy of the online application along with self-attested copies of all the required documents to the Dean of Colleges, Kurukshetra University, Kurukshetra, within the stipulated time limit.

vacancy_details.eligibility: Educational qualification will be determined as per the latest Self-Finance Scheme Rules of UGC, Kurukshetra University (KUK), AICTE, and Haryana Government.

jobs.title: IISER Mohali Yoga Instructor Recruitment 2026, Check Eligibility Criteria & How to Apply
jobs.how_to_apply: Before attending the interview, please read the official notification carefully. Candidates must report to the venue at the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Bring a set of self-attested photocopies along with all original documents, such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificates (if applicable). If required, bring the completed application form. Verify the eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete the registration formalities. If required, bring an extra passport-sized photograph to submit. Form Download: Visit the official website or use the link below to download it.

vacancy_details.eligibility: The required educational qualifications, experience, and other eligibility criteria for the Yoga Instructor position will be determined by the detailed notification issued by the Institute. jobs.title: Northern Railway ATVM Facilitator Vacancy 2026, Apply Now
jobs.how_to_apply: Visit the official Northern Railway website at www.nr.indianrailways.gov.in or the link below. Download the tender form and the document containing all terms and conditions. Fill out the application form accurately with all the required details. Submit your completed application in the designated tender box at the office by 10 August 2026. Ensure the submission is made strictly between 10:00 AM and 2:00 PM on the deadline date. Applicants must provide a refundable security deposit of Rs. 50,000/- for NSG-1 and NSG-2 stations or Rs. Rs. 25,000/- for other categories, payable to the Sr. Divisional Finance Manager, Ambala Cantt, via Demand Draft, Fixed Deposit, or Money Receipt. This deposit is refundable upon contract completion after adjusting any pending dues, but it will be forfeited if the facilitator expresses an inability to operate the machine after being engaged.
jobs.jobs_info: Northern Railway ATVM Facilitator Vacancy 2026: Northern Railway, Ambala Division, has issued a notification for the ATVM Facilitator position. vacancy_details.eligibility: 25 सितंबर 2025 (पंडित दीन दयाल उपाध्याय की जयंती)
23 साल और उससे ज़्यादा उम्र की महिलाएं
विवाहित और अविवाहित दोनों महिलाएं पात्र हैं
ऐसे परिवार जिनकी वार्षिक आय ₹1,00,000 से कम है

हर परिवार में एलिजिबल महिलाओं की संख्या की कोई लिमिट नहीं है; अगर 3 महिलाएं एलिजिबल हैं, तो तीनों को बेनिफिट मिलेगा।
